calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2014 Continued To Sep-03-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-20-2014 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: DORON WEINBERG, ESQ., 415.431.3472, FOR DEFENDANT DORON WEINBERG; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DORON WEINBERG's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. "Factual innocence is an element of a legal malpractice cause of action stemming from representation in a criminal action." Wilkinson v. Zelen (2008) 167 Cal.App.4th 37, 45. In this case, paragraph 10 of the complaint indicates that plaintiff is still serving the requirements of his sentence. Paragraph 12 states that plaintiff's appeal is currently pending. Accordingly, plaintiff has not been exonerated and cannot allege factual innocence. A stay is not appropriate under Coscia v. McKenna & Cuneo (2001) 25 Cal.4th 1194. CCP 340.6 was amended after that decision was issued and plaintiff now has two years after exoneration to commence an action. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Joyce Finley #8620.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-13-2014 Continued To May-20-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DORON WEINBERG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to May 20, 2014 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than May 13, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
